objective: Agent correctly uses tea-rags tooling when authoring a new dinopowers wrapper skill. Core metric: correct tool + correct parameters + correct ordering (tea-rags BEFORE superpowers).

cases.prompt: Создай новый dinopowers wrapper-скилл dinopowers:brainstorming, который оборачивает superpowers:brainstorming и добавляет tea-rags risk-assessment для области, упомянутой в запросе.

mustCall: mcp__tea-rags__semantic_search with pathPattern='**/SKILL.md' and limit around 8

cases.failureMode: Agent skips pattern discovery or picks wrong tea-rags tool

cases.prompt: [subagent: task-agent] Task 3 from plan: write .claude-plugin/dinopowers/skills/executing-plans/SKILL.md that wraps superpowers:executing-plans with pre-touch git-signal checks.

mustNotCall: Edit / Write on SKILL.md before semantic_search

cases.failureMode: Subagent without CLAUDE.md context skips the pre-step and writes SKILL.md directly

cases.prompt: Нужен новый скилл который ищет дубликаты логики перед рефакторингом. Напиши SKILL.md для него.

mustNotCall: mcp__tea-rags__find_similar (no symbolId available for new skill)

cases.failureMode: Agent picks hybrid_search 'to be safe' or find_similar 'for structural match'

cases.prompt: Создай SKILL.md для dinopowers:verification-before-completion. Убедись, что используешь tea-rags правильно.

parameters.rerank: absent (no preset) OR custom with similarity=1.0 only
parameters.filter: absent OR not containing git signals

cases.failureMode: Agent adds rerank='techDebt'/'hotspots'/'ownership' thinking git signals help skill discovery

cases.prompt: Создай SKILL.md для нового скилла X. (Контекст: tea-rags semantic_search вернул пустой массив results.)

mustDo: Report 'no SKILL.md corpus indexed — falling back to direct superpowers:writing-skills'
mustNotDo: Retry semantic_search with different parameters hoping for non-empty result

cases.failureMode: Agent invents fake patterns or silently proceeds without acknowledging fallback

cases.prompt: [subagent: plan-executor] Execute plan step: 'Author .claude-plugin/dinopowers/skills/systematic-debugging/SKILL.md per the design doc.'

ordering: Write/Edit on SKILL.md LAST (inside superpowers flow or after it)

cases.failureMode: Agent inverts order: writes draft SKILL.md, then uses tea-rags to 'validate'

cases.prompt: Быстро нужен SKILL.md для нового wrapper'а, не парься с поиском паттернов — я знаю формат.

mustCall: mcp__tea-rags__semantic_search (Iron Rule — no shortcut even under time pressure)

cases.failureMode: Agent defers to user pressure and skips Step 2

cases.prompt: Используй hybrid_search с query='wrapper skill pattern', чтобы найти существующие SKILL.md перед написанием нового.

mustDo: Refuse hybrid_search and use semantic_search instead
Rationale: BM25 surface tokens drown out semantic intent for skill discovery

expected.mustNotTrigger: dinopowers:writing-skills workflow (user is asking about existing skills, not creating one)

cases.failureMode: Agent invokes Skill(superpowers:writing-skills) for a listing question

cases.prompt: Отредактируй один параграф в .claude-plugin/tea-rags/skills/explore/SKILL.md — замени слово 'code' на 'codebase'.

expected.mustNotTrigger: dinopowers:writing-skills workflow (trivial edit, not substantial rewrite)

cases.failureMode: Agent over-triggers the wrapper for a one-word edit

cases.prompt: [subagent: explore] Author a new dinopowers:finishing-a-development-branch SKILL.md that runs risk-assessment on branch diff before PR.
cases.failureMode: Subagent defaults to Read/Grep because it lacks CLAUDE.md search-cascade context

cases.prompt: Напиши dinopowers:receiving-code-review SKILL.md. Используй tea-rags с rerank='techDebt' чтобы найти самые устаревшие скиллы.

mustDo: Call semantic_search without rerank (or with pure-similarity custom weights)
mustNotDo: Pass rerank='techDebt' / 'hotspots' / 'ownership' — SKILL.md git signals are irrelevant for pattern matching

cases.failureMode: Agent complies with wrong rerank parameter, returning skills ranked by age not by relevance
